ddls:
CREATE TABLE "student_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course */,
  "AveCarelessness" REAL /* Average carelessness score */,
  "AveKnow" REAL /* Average knowledge score */,
  "AveCorrect.x" REAL /* Average correct responses */,
  "AveResBored" REAL /* Average boredom response */,
  "AveResEngcon" REAL /* Average engagement response */,
  "AveResConf" REAL /* Average confidence response */,
  "AveResFrust" REAL /* Average frustration response */,
  "AveResOfftask" REAL /* Average off-task response */,
  "AveResGaming" REAL /* Average gaming response */,
  "NumActions" REAL /* Number of actions taken */,
  "isSTEM" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subject is STEM-related */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the engagement data was recorded */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each learning session */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., lecture, quiz, assignment) */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the student during the activity (e.g., campus, home) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Overall engagement score for the session */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Student's satisfaction with the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_engagement_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_engagement_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program or course the student is enrolled in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, inactive, graduated) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major or concentration within the program */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Current year of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits offered for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instructor */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Link to the course syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the instructor teaches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
